ui.visualizerKicker: Try it free — see your venue decorated in 60 seconds.

styles.name: Classic Garland
styles.description: Full balloon garland, perfect for entryways and backdrops
styles.prompt: Add a beautiful, full balloon garland arch using the colors {colors} to the main area of this image. Make it look realistic, celebratory, and elegantly attached to the wall or structure. Keep the exact framing, camera angle, and every fixed element of the source photo unchanged — only add the balloon decor.

styles.name: Boho Chic Arch
styles.description: Elegant arch with pampas grass accents
styles.prompt: Integrate a stylish boho-themed balloon arch into the image using the colors {colors}. Add some dried pampas grass accents within the balloons for a chic, textured look. Ensure it fits the space naturally. Keep the exact framing, camera angle, and every fixed element of the source photo unchanged — only add the balloon decor.

styles.name: Dynamic Splash
styles.description: Energetic explosion of balloons for celebrations
styles.prompt: Create a vibrant splash of balloons in the photo using the colors {colors}. The arrangement should be dynamic and asymmetrical, like a joyful explosion of color. Include balloons of various sizes. Keep the exact framing, camera angle, and every fixed element of the source photo unchanged — only add the balloon decor.

styles.name: Sleek & Modern
styles.prompt: Add a sophisticated and elegant balloon arrangement using shades of {colors}. The design should be sleek and modern, perhaps a half-arch or a pillar, suitable for a formal event. Keep the exact framing, camera angle, and every fixed element of the source photo unchanged — only add the balloon decor.

styles.name: Whimsical Theme
styles.prompt: Transform the space with a whimsical themed balloon decoration using the colors {colors}. Incorporate clear balloons to look like bubbles and maybe some twisted balloons to suggest unique shapes. Keep the exact framing, camera angle, and every fixed element of the source photo unchanged — only add the balloon decor.
